title: Biome Makeover
description: Biome Makeover is a mod that takes vanilla's biomes and gives them a fresh coat of paint.
body:
![Biome Makeover](https://biomemakeover.laserknights.com/notes/images/bmlogo2023_with_shadow_small.png)

Biome Makeover is a mod designed to give specific biomes a fresh coat of paint.  
We aim for our changes to be vanilla friendly and suited for any mod pack.


## Requirements
**Fabric Requires:**  [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)  
**Forge Requires:**  [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)

## About
Biome Makeover adds lots of stuff!

We have currently done 4 makeovers:
- Dark Forest
- Swamp
- Badlands
- Mushroom Fields

Each makeover features its own structures, plants, mobs and mechanics.

[Check out the trailers for the mod here](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL04C_QnOoDfS-WBWk-6aNtWZPwpUVM-10) 

[Check out our Wiki here](https://biomemakeover.laserknights.com) for a detailed overview of the mod or check below for some screenshots.

## Community  

Come [join our Discord Server](https://discord.gg/D5bNnw7), we love to see what people are making with Biome Makeover. If you have any questions, we're more than happy to answer! 

If you're not into Discord but still want to get in touch, check out our [Github Discussions](https://github.com/Lemonszz/Biome-Makeover/discussions) page!

Check our out [YouTube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/laserknights) where we post videos about the mod.

## Bug Reporting  
This is a large mod, so issues sometimes get overlooked. It would help us out a lot if you could report them [either in our Discord](https://discord.gg/D5bNnw7) or on our [Github Repository](https://github.com/Lemonszz/Biome-Makeover/issues).  

See our wiki for [more information on reporting issues](https://biomemakeover.laserknights.com/notes/report/).

## FAQ
- **Can you backport to X version**
	- No, we will not backport, sorry.
- **Can you add X feature**
	- Maybe, content ideas usually will not be added, but we're willing to listen to suggestions.
- **My game crashed/I found a bug!**
	- Oh no! [Check out our bug reporting guide](https://biomemakeover.laserknights.com/notes/report/).
